title: PONY DANCE Thermal Blackout Curtains - Thermal Insulated Curtain Anti Cold and Heat Energy Saving Eyelet Curtains for Bedroom, Width 140 cm x Height 240 cm, Grey, 1 Piece
features: Single Panel - Each PONY DANCE blackout curtain panel measures 55 x 94 inches (Width x Length). Perfect for windows and doors, it enhances both functionality and elegance in any space.

Blackout Material - Blocks 85-95% of sunlight and UV rays (darker colors provide better performance) without lining, thanks to triple-weave technology. Ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, and nurseries.

Thermal Insulation - PONY DANCE thermal curtains reduce heat loss in winter and minimize heat gain in summer, making them suitable for doors and windows. They protect your furniture, floors, and artwork from sun damage.
Easy to Hang - The eyelet design blends seamlessly with any decor. Perfectly fits curtain poles up to 1.5" in diameter. Effortless to install and operate.

Easy Care - Crafted from OEKO-TEX certified materials meeting high quality standards. Machine washable at temperatures below 30°C (86°F). Wrinkles can be removed by washing or steaming. For any inquiries, please feel free to contact us.
